name: io.github.hoornet/agentdocs-mcp
description: Read, search, create, update, comment on and share AgentDocs (agentdocs.eu) documentation — 18 tools, slug-or-UUID addressing, account or space-scoped tokens.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTDOCS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: AgentDocs API token (account or space-scoped). Profile → Regenerate API Token, or Space settings → Tokens.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTDOCS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the AgentDocs instance. Set this only for a self-hosted instance.
